# Tex Vet Trees & Landscaping

> Veteran-owned and operated tree service and landscaping company serving Central and North Texas. Founded by U.S. Army veteran Richard Maddox. Precision tree care rooted in military discipline. Free estimates — call (254) 447-5090 or email texvettrees@gmail.com.

## Services

- [Tree Service](https://texvettrees.com/services/tree-service): Crown thinning, deadwood removal, hazardous and storm-damage takedowns, stump grinding, full haul-off, pest and disease inspections.
- [Landscaping](https://texvettrees.com/services/landscaping): Custom design and planting using native and drought-tolerant plants built for the Texas climate. Mulch, stone, bed borders, seasonal cleanups, irrigation-friendly layouts.
- [Turf](https://texvettrees.com/services/turf): Premium synthetic turf installation. Pet- and kid-safe, proper drainage base prep, UV-stable blades, putting greens and play areas.
- [Hardscaping](https://texvettrees.com/services/hardscaping): Engineered paver patios, stone walkways, retaining walls, fire pits, and seating walls with proper grading and drainage.
- [Fencing](https://texvettrees.com/services/fencing): Cedar privacy fencing, steel and pipe ranch fencing, custom gates, repairs, restaining, and replacement.
- [Decking & Patios](https://texvettrees.com/services/decking-patios): Custom decks, pergolas, and covered patios in cedar or composite. Built-in lighting and seating options.

## Company

- [About](https://texvettrees.com/about): Background on founder Richard Maddox, U.S. Army veteran. Company history, values, and mission.
- [Reviews](https://texvettrees.com/reviews): Customer reviews and testimonials.
- [Gallery](https://texvettrees.com/gallery): Before-and-after project photos.
- [Blog](https://texvettrees.com/blog): Tree care and landscaping tips for Texas homeowners.
- [Community](https://texvettrees.com/community): Community involvement and veteran initiatives.
- [Work With Us](https://texvettrees.com/work-with-us): Employment and subcontractor opportunities.

## Contact

- [Contact / Get A Quote](https://texvettrees.com/contact): Free, no-obligation estimates. Phone: (254) 447-5090. Email: texvettrees@gmail.com. Service area: Central and North Texas.
